title: Timeline Journey and Milestones - Structured Source
content:
Career journey summary:
- Foundation stage: Software Engineering Intern at Infosys, followed by Machine Learning Engineer at Cognizant where he built production NLP/ML pipelines at enterprise scale.
- Scale-up stage: Advanced model delivery with MLOps practices, distributed data processing, and cloud inference optimization.
- Transition stage: M.S. in Data Science at UMBC (GPA 3.91/4.0), with hands-on AI/ML internships and applied research-driven implementation.
- Current stage: Data Scientist at Enigma Technologies in a GenAI/ML role focused on production RAG and LLM-enabled automation workflows.

Key milestones:
- Built and operates Batcave, a 56-container hybrid-cloud AI platform with 36+ services and 177GB data footprint.
- Improved core inference paths from around 450ms to under 90ms through pipeline and serving optimization.
- Delivered workflow efficiency improvements of roughly 30-40% in NLP/document intelligence contexts.

Narrative flow for prompts:
- Skills to systems: strong ML/GenAI foundation translated into production-ready architectures.
- Systems to outcomes: deployment, monitoring, and iteration tied to measurable performance and efficiency gains.
- Outcomes to leadership: operates full-stack AI infrastructure with reliability, security, and automation discipline.
